([Urdu](/wiki/Urdu_language "Urdu language"): ناظم پشاور) is the Mayor who heads the Municipal Corporation of Peshawar (MCP) which controls the City District Government of [Peshawar](/wiki/Peshawar "Peshawar").

["Mayors, chairmen of tehsil councils take oath in 17 districts"](https://www.dawn.com/news/1680202/mayors-chairmen-of-tehsil-councils-take-oath-in-17-districts). *Dawn (newspaper)*. 16 March 2022. Retrieved 21 January 2022.

["KP's new LG system: structure, powers, and voting process"](https://www.samaa.tv/news/2021/12/kps-new-lg-system-structure-powers-and-voting-process/). *SAMAA TV*. 17 December 2021. Retrieved 5 January 2022.

["Polling under way in KP for first phase of local bodies election 2021"](https://www.geo.tv/latest/388533-kp-all-geared-up-to-hold-first-phase-of-lg-polls-today). *Geo News*. 19 December 2021. Retrieved 5 January 2022.
["Major upset for PTI as JUI-F wins Peshawar mayor seat"](https://www.dawn.com/news/1664848). *Dawn (newspaper)*. 21 December 2021. Retrieved 5 January 2022.

From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia

Head of Local Government of Peshawar (District Council Peshawar)

| Mayor of Peshawar | |
| --- | --- |
| ناظم پشاور | |
| City District Government Peshawar | |
| Incumbent [Zubair Ali](/wiki/Zubair_Ali "Zubair Ali") since 16 March 2022 | |
| [Residence](/wiki/Official_residence "Official residence") | [Peshawar](/wiki/Peshawar "Peshawar"), [Pakistan](/wiki/Pakistan "Pakistan") |
| [Term length](/wiki/Term_of_office "Term of office") | Four years |
| Website | [cdgpeshawar.gov.pk](http://cdgpeshawar.gov.pk) |

**Nazim-e-Peshawar** ([Urdu](/wiki/Urdu_language "Urdu language"): ناظم پشاور) is the Mayor who heads the Municipal Corporation of Peshawar (MCP) which controls the City District Government of [Peshawar](/wiki/Peshawar "Peshawar").

## Khyber Pakhtunkhwa Local Government Act 2013

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Mayor_of_Peshawar&action=edit&section=1 "Edit section: Khyber Pakhtunkhwa Local Government Act 2013")]

Under the KPK Local government Act 2013, the City District Government of Peshawar by the District Council is formed which is divided into four towns each headed by its own Town Nazim and Naib Nazim.

following is the number of Peshawar district council members[[1]](#cite_note-1)

| District | General | Women | Peasant/Workers | Minorities | Youth | Total |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| Peshawar | 92 | 31 | 5 | 5 | 5 | 138 |

## List of mayors of Peshawar

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Mayor_of_Peshawar&action=edit&section=2 "Edit section: List of mayors of Peshawar")]

| # | Party | Mayor | Start date | End date | Deputy Mayor |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| 1 |  | Azam Khan Afridi | 2001 | 2005 | Dr. Muhammad Iqbal Khalil |
| 2 |  | [Haji Ghulam Ali](/wiki/Haji_Ghulam_Ali "Haji Ghulam Ali") | 17 October 2005 | 11 February 2009 | Razaullah |
| 3 |  | Haji Mohammad Umar | 2010 | 2014 |  |
| 4 |  | Arbab Asim Khan | 30 August 2015 | 2021 | Syed Qasim Ali Shah |
| 5 |  | Zubair Ali | 16 March 2022[[2]](#cite_note-2) | Incumbent | - |

## Mayor elections history

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Mayor_of_Peshawar&action=edit&section=3 "Edit section: Mayor elections history")]

### Mayor elections 2015

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Mayor_of_Peshawar&action=edit&section=4 "Edit section: Mayor elections 2015")]

| Peshawar City District Government Elections 2015.[[3]](#cite_note-3)[[4]](#cite_note-4) | | | | | | | | |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| # | Party | Town 1 | Town 2 | Town 3 | Town 4 | PMC | Percentage | |
| 1 | [Pakistan Tehreek-e-Insaf](/wiki/Pakistan_Tehreek-e-Insaf "Pakistan Tehreek-e-Insaf") | **16** | **13** | **11** | 4 | **44** | **55.7%** |  |
| 2 | [Jamiat Ulema-e-Islam (F)](/wiki/Jamiat_Ulema-e-Islam_(F) "Jamiat Ulema-e-Islam (F)") | 0 | 2 | 3 | 2 | 7 | **9%** |  |
| 3 | [Jamaat-e-Islami Pakistan](/wiki/Jamaat-e-Islami_Pakistan "Jamaat-e-Islami Pakistan") | 0 | 2 | 2 | 2 | 6 | **7.6%** |  |
| 4 | [Pakistan Muslim League (N)](/wiki/Pakistan_Muslim_League_(N) "Pakistan Muslim League (N)") | 0 | 0 | 0 | **5** | 5 | **6.3%** |  |
| 5 | [Awami National Party](/wiki/Awami_National_Party "Awami National Party") | 3 | 0 | 0 | 1 | 4 | **5%** |  |
| 6 | [Pakistan Peoples Party](/wiki/Pakistan_Peoples_Party "Pakistan Peoples Party") | 0 | 2 | 0 | 0 | 2 | **2.5%** |  |
| 7 | Independents | 1 | 3 | 4 | 3 | 11 | **13.9%** |  |
| - | **Results awaited** | 5 | 3 | 1 | 4 | 13 | **14%** |  |
| - | **Total** | 25 | 25 | 21 | 21 | 92 | **100%** |  |
| **Votes Polled** | | **485,042** | | | | | **32.8%** |  |
| **Total Votes** | | **1,479,002** | | | | | **100%** |  |

### Mayor election 2021

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Mayor_of_Peshawar&action=edit&section=5 "Edit section: Mayor election 2021")]

Local bodies election were held on 19 December 2021 after the implementation of new local body structure in [Khyber Pakhtunkhwa](/wiki/Khyber_Pakhtunkhwa "Khyber Pakhtunkhwa").[[5]](#cite_note-5)[[6]](#cite_note-6)

2021 KPK Local Bodies Election[[7]](#cite_note-7)

| Party | | Candidate | Votes | % |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
|  | **[JUI-F](/wiki/Jamiat_Ulema-e-Islam_(F) "Jamiat Ulema-e-Islam (F)")** | **Zubair Ali** | 62,388 |  |
|  | [PTI](/wiki/Pakistan_Tehreek-e-Insaf "Pakistan Tehreek-e-Insaf") | Rizwan Bangash | 50,669 |  |
|  | [PPP](/wiki/Pakistan_Peoples_Party "Pakistan Peoples Party") | [Arbab Zarak Khan](/wiki/Arbab_Zarak_Khan "Arbab Zarak Khan") | 45,000 |  |
|  | [JUI (F)](/wiki/Jamiat_Ulema-e-Islam_(F) "Jamiat Ulema-e-Islam (F)") **gain** from [PTI](/wiki/Pakistan_Tehreek-e-Insaf "Pakistan Tehreek-e-Insaf") | | [Swing](/wiki/Swing_(politics) "Swing (politics)") |  |  |
